subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-20
subcodes.first_line: Association with outsiders is like unto a 'knife-edge file'. It wears and cuts away the spirit. One does not hear from them one joy-creating word. From noon till now I have been speaking
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly
